The temple known as Vrfa has only one storey and dome,
measures 12 cubits in width, and is circular all round. The Harfisa
is shaped like a swan with beak, wings and tail, and is 12 cubits
broad. It has only one storey. The Ghata is shaped like a pot, 8
cubits broad and single-storeyed and single-domed.

The Sarvatabhadra has four doors in four directions, many
beautiful dormer windows (i.e. upper rooms) and five storeys, its
breadth being 26 cubits. (It is square in shape).
